title: Decision No. 67 of 2021 Designating Foreign States under Legislative Decree No. 56 of 2018
summary: Operationalises the cloud law by identifying foreign states for which the special customer-content jurisdiction framework applies.

theme_notes.data_privacy.crossborder_data_flows: Designates foreign states for Bahrain’s foreign-party cloud services regime.
theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.cloud_dat: Designates foreign states for the foreign-party cloud services regime.

notes: Related instruments: Legislative Decree No. 56 of 2018 and later amendments including Decisions No. 6 of 2025, No. 58 of 2025, and No. 10 of 2026
